Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses; And Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $4,991.20 Against Plaintiffs Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-19-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Attys. ELLIOT J. SIEGEL and JOHN L. SCHWAB, Esq. of King & Siegel LLP (Tel: 213-465-4802) for plaintiff Amy Babson-Koenig;
Atty. MICHAEL J. HUI, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, P.C. (Tel: 415-433-1940) for Defendant GPS Services, Inc.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GPS SERVICES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses; And Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $4,991.20 Against Plaintiffs Counsel.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for both sides authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued.

The Court schedules a meet and confer conference with the parties pursuant to C.C.P. Sec. 2016.080 to take place on February 23, 2021. The Judge Pro Tem will email a Zoom invitation directly to the parties. After conducting the conference, the Court intends to rule on this matter.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Kylie Shepherd, CSR No. 13756, Tel: 714-873-7217, Email: kylie.shepherd.csr@gmail.com (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2020 Continued To Feb-24-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Compel Compliance With Agreement To Produce Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-16-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ELLIOT J. SIEGEL, Esq. of King & Siegel LLP (Tel: 213-465-4802) for Plaintiff Amy Babson-Koenig;
Atty. MICHAEL J. HUI, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, P.C. (Tel: 415-433-1940) for Defendant GPS Services, Inc. (erroneously sued as "GPS Services, Inc. d/b/a Gap Inc.")

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF AMY BABSON-KOENIG's Motion To Compel Compliance With Agreement To Produce Documents And Request For Sanctions.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with modifications only as to deadlines: Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Compliance with Agreement to Produce Documents is GRANTED. Defendant shall produce all responsive documents within five weeks of notice of this order. If all responsive documents are not produced within five weeks of notice of this order, sanctions in the amount of $2,500 shall become due and payable (against defendant and in favor of plaintiff) within seven weeks of notice of this order.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Teresa Kenworthy, CSR No. 6673, Tel: 530-308-2691, Email: tkenworthy@gmail.com (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
